subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of the Sacred Threshold! The stability of every throne... the most honored government
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس نظم سریر جهانبانی و انتظام دیهیم حکمرانی بقوه آسمانیست
subcodes.subjects: @Christian doctrine and practice, @predictions and prophecies, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
